blocker.reason: Cannot connect to Electron app via CDP to perform UI testing
blocker.details: The Electron app starts successfully with DevTools listening on ws://127.0.0.1:9222, but agent-browser cannot connect via CDP. This blocks UI validation of the COA form validation fix.

evidence: Source file COAFormPage.tsx contains regex /^[0-9]+(-[0-9]+)*$/ which correctly accepts GL Account codes like '11-11-001'
Built dist file dist/renderer/assets/index-CUpoIoxE.js contains the same correct regex
However, the packaged app.asar in release/win-unpacked/resources/ was not automatically updated by 'npm run build'
codeFixVerified.note: The code fix itself is correct and verified. UI testing requires either rebuilding the asar or running in dev mode.

environmentIssues: Electron app starts and logs show 'DevTools listening on ws://127.0.0.1:9222'
agent-browser --auto-connect returns 'No running Chrome instance with remote debugging found'
agent-browser --cdp 9222 returns 'Failed to connect via CDP'
netstat shows no process listening on port 9222 after app appears to start
